front: What are the challenges in formulating oral peptide drugs?
back: Oral peptide challenges: 1) GI degradation (pH, proteases), 2) Poor intestinal permeability, 3) First-pass hepatic metabolism, 4) Food effects on absorption. Solutions: 1) Permeation enhancers (SNAC for semaglutide), 2) Protease inhibitors, 3) Nanoparticle encapsulation, 4) Enteric coatings, 5) Mucoadhesive systems.
